description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a mix of materials, including concrete, wood, and glass. The front facade showcases large windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. There are two prominent balconies with glass railings, one on each level, and a wooden privacy screen on the upper right side. The structure includes multiple rooms, visible interior partitions, and a combination of open and enclosed spaces. The exterior color palette is dominated by shades of gray, white, and natural wood tones, with black accents on window frames and railings. The flat roof and minimal overhangs reinforce the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story house with large windows, flat roof, glass balconies, and a mix of gray, white, and wood finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, two glass balconies, a wooden privacy screen, and the main entry area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid gray wall, minimal window openings, and the depth of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with limited window exposure, mostly solid walls, and a glimpse of interior partitions.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the secondary balcony, entry doors, and the transition between exterior materials.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a flush door with minimal steps, integrated into a recessed area with adjacent glass panels and a wooden deck.
